chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1367 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11.12.2024 Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh along with Najaf Ali Janwri, Focal Peroson of Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Kharipur/Respondent No.2. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files compliance report along with original postdated cheque bearing No.48663264 dated 06.01.2025 of Rs.200,000/-, Cheque No.48663269 dated 06.02.2025 of Rs.218,000/-; Cheque No.48663270 dated 06.03.2025 of Rs.218,000/-, Cheque No.48663271 dated 07.04.2025 of Rs.218,000/-; Cheque No.48663272 dated 06.05.2025 of Rs.218,000/- and Cheque No.48663273 dated 06.06.2025 of Rs.219,157/- which are handed over to the petitioner under proper acknowledgment in Court. After receiving the cheques in question, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that purpose of filing instant petition has been served, therefore, under instructions he does not wish to press it, which is not opposed by learned AAG Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
